Name: UStaticMeshComponent

Variables.Name: ForcedLodModel
Variables.Description: If 0, auto-select LOD level. if >0, force to (ForcedLodModel-1).

Variables.Name: PreviousLODLevel
Variables.Description: LOD that was desired for rendering this StaticMeshComponent last frame.

Variables.Name: MinLOD
Variables.Description:
Specifies the smallest LOD that will be used for this component.
	  This is ignored if ForcedLodModel is enabled.

Variables.Name: StaticMesh
Variables.Description: The static mesh that this component uses to render

Variables.Name: VisibilityCollisionColor
Variables.Description: Whether you want to turn on the collision display preview

Variables.Name: bEnableSimpleMaterial
Variables.Description: If true, WireframeColorOverride will be used. If false, color is determined based on mobility and physics simulation settings

Variables.Name: bOverrideWireframeColor
Variables.Description: If true, WireframeColorOverride will be used. If false, color is determined based on mobility and physics simulation settings

Variables.Name: bOverrideMinLOD
Variables.Description: Whether to override the MinLOD setting of the static mesh asset with the MinLOD of this component.

Variables.Name: bOverrideNavigationExport
Variables.Description: If true, bForceNavigationObstacle flag will take priority over navigation data stored in StaticMesh

Variables.Name: bForceNavigationObstacle
Variables.Description: Allows overriding navigation export behavior per component: full collisions or dynamic obstacle

Variables.Name: bDisallowMeshPaintPerInstance
Variables.Description: If true, mesh painting is disallowed on this instance. Set if vertex colors are overridden in a construction script.

Variables.Name: bIgnoreInstanceForTextureStreaming
Variables.Description:
Ignore this instance of this static mesh when calculating streaming information.
	 	This can be useful when doing things like applying character textures to static geometry,
	 	to avoid them using distance-based streaming.

Variables.Name: bOverrideLightMapRes
Variables.Description: Whether to override the lightmap resolution defined in the static mesh.

Variables.Name: bCastDistanceFieldIndirectShadow
Variables.Description:
Whether to use the mesh distance field representation (when present) for shadowing indirect lighting (from lightmaps or skylight) on Movable components.
	  This works like capsule shadows on skeletal meshes, except using the mesh distance field so no physics asset is required.
	  The StaticMesh must have 'Generate Mesh Distance Field' enabled, or the project must have 'Generate Mesh Distance Fields' enabled for this feature to work.

Variables.Name: bOverrideDistanceFieldSelfShadowBias
Variables.Description: Whether to override the DistanceFieldSelfShadowBias setting of the static mesh asset with the DistanceFieldSelfShadowBias of this component.

Variables.Name: bUseSubDivisions
Variables.Description: Whether to use subdivisions or just the triangle's vertices.

Variables.Name: bUseDefaultCollision
Variables.Description: Use the collision profile specified in the StaticMesh asset.

Variables.Name: bForceNotHzbOccluder
Variables.Description: not a hzb Occluder

Variables.Name: OverriddenLightMapRes
Variables.Description: Light map resolution to use on this component, used if bOverrideLightMapRes is true and there is a valid StaticMesh.

Variables.Name: StreamingDistanceMultiplier
Variables.Description:
Allows adjusting the desired streaming distance of streaming textures that uses UV 0.
	  1.0 is the default, whereas a higher value makes the textures stream in sooner from far away.
	  A lower value (0.0-1.0) makes the textures stream in later (you have to be closer).
	  Value can be < 0 (from legcay content, or code changes)

Variables.Name: LODData
Variables.Description: Static mesh LOD data.  Contains static lighting data along with instanced mesh vertex colors.

Variables.Name: StreamingTextureData
Variables.Description: The list of texture, bounds and scales. As computed in the texture streaming build process.

Variables.Name: IsDynamicInstancingParametersEnabled
Variables.Description: Is dynamic instancing parameters enabled

Variables.Name: DynamicInstancingParameters
Variables.Description: Dynamic instancing parameters

Variables.Name: LightmassSettings
Variables.Description: The Lightmass settings for this object.

Variables.Name: IdeaBakingSettings
Variables.Description: Add by luciuszhang: The IdeaBaking settings for this object.

Variables.Name: LODSectionHiddenFlags
Variables.Description: Hidden Flags for Rendering Section (8 bits = flags, Support 8 Sections), add by connerxiong 2022.6.16.

Variables.Name: OutlineStaticMesh
Variables.Description: Outline Static Mesh

Variables.Name: SubDivisionStepSize
Variables.Description: Subdivision step size for static vertex lighting.

Variables.Name: WireframeColorOverride
Variables.Description: Wireframe color to use if bOverrideWireframeColor is true

Variables.Name: SelectedEditorSection
Variables.Description: The section currently selected in the Editor. Used for highlighting

Variables.Name: SelectedEditorMaterial
Variables.Description: The material currently selected in the Editor. Used for highlighting

Variables.Name: SectionIndexPreview
Variables.Description: Index of the section to preview. If set to INDEX_NONE, all section will be rendered. Used for isolating in Static Mesh Tool

Variables.Name: MaterialIndexPreview
Variables.Description: Index of the material to preview. If set to INDEX_NONE, all section will be rendered. Used for isolating in Static Mesh Tool

Variables.Name: StaticMeshImportVersion
Variables.Description:
The import version of the static mesh when it was assign this is update when:
	  - The user assign a new staticmesh to the component
	  - The component is serialize (IsSaving)
	  - Default value is BeforeImportStaticMeshVersionWasAdded
	 
	  If when the component get load (PostLoad) the version of the attach staticmesh is newer
	  then this value, we will remap the material override because the order of the materials list
	  in the staticmesh can be changed. Hopefully there is a remap table save in the staticmesh.

Variables.Name: bCustomOverrideVertexColorPerLOD
Variables.Description: The component has some custom painting on LODs or not.

Variables.Name: DistanceFieldIndirectShadowMinVisibility
Variables.Description: Controls how dark the dynamic indirect shadow can be.

Variables.Name: DistanceFieldSelfShadowBias
Variables.Description: Useful for reducing self shadowing from distance field methods when using world position offset to animate the mesh's vertices.

Variables.Name: StaticMeshDerivedDataKey
Variables.Description: Derived data key of the static mesh, used to determine if an update from the source static mesh is required.

Variables.Name: MaterialStreamingRelativeBoxes
Variables.Description: Material Bounds used for texture streaming.

Functions.Name: SetStaticMesh
Functions.Description: Change the StaticMesh used by this instance.

Functions.Name: SetDistanceFieldSelfShadowBias
Functions.Description: Sets the component's DistanceFieldSelfShadowBias.  bOverrideDistanceFieldSelfShadowBias must be enabled for this to have an effect.

Functions.Name: EnableMeshClip4Planes
Functions.Description:
Num of ClipPlanes is 4
	  0: Top Plane
	  1: Down Plane
	  2: Left Plane
	  3: Right Plane
